summary.lv: WorkingDay Latvia meklē Vadošo .NET izstrādātāju klientam Storent, kurš vadīs .NET risinājumu arhitektūru un izstrādi loģistikas un nomas jomā.
summary.en: WorkingDay Latvia is seeking a Lead .NET Developer for client Storent to drive .NET solution architecture and development in the logistics and equipment rental sector.
